description: Retrieve official legislative documents and data for H.R. 4346 (117th Congress), the CHIPS and Science Act. Save the full official text of the 'Enrolled Bill' (Final version) as a PDF to /home/ga/Documents/Legislation/chips_act_final.pdf. Record the date, Roll Call number, and the final count of 'Yeas' and 'Nays' for the House Vote 'Motion to Concur in the Senate Amendment to the House Amendment to the Senate Amendment' (Vote Roll No. 404) on July 28, 2022, in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/Legislation/vote_tally.txt.
